title: Delete My Origins! (Human Remain)
description: Remove internal origins in Origins Mod except Human one.
body:
# Delete My Origins!

This datapack can remove internal origins in the Origins Mod.

There are two versions of datapack. Here is the `Human` version, which will keep the human origin.

**Note: 1.Since a datapack cannot have multiple version number, loading may have warnings. Just ignore them.**

**2.These origins can still obtain with command.**
